findings: Live MTM data is now observable (portfolio_snapshot 46 at 2026-04-28 09:31:38): total ₹1,002,452.33, holdings_value ₹596,332.85 (vs ₹595,437.40 at cost), total unrealized P&L +₹2,452.33 (+0.245%). Intraday delta +₹900.70 vs Day-4 EOD. Book is modestly positive at the open.

Deployment 59.45% on filled book (5.55 pp under the binding 0.65 max_deployed_pct cap, admission window OPEN); projected 72.44% on full carryover fill (7.44 pp grandfathered breach, admission window CLOSED on full-fill basis). The cap mechanically gates any new BUY by the strategy layer until either (a) a SELL frees deployment under 65%, or (b) one of the 3 carryover OPEN orders is rejected/cancelled.

All 5 pre-armed triggers from 09:00/09:30 remain DORMANT this tick: (i) Power on full fill 19.77% — 2.23 pp short of 22% line; (ii) no day-stale OPEN order has crossed 24h yet (TATAPOWER closest at ~23h47m, will cross at ~10:13); (iii) MAHABANK at -4.15%, 2.85 pp above the -7% line; (iv) BFSI flat at 17.62%, 0.88 pp under the 18.5% re-inflection line, no new BFSI add; (v) realized day-loss ₹0, ₹15,000 buffer to half-loss-gate flag, book is in fact POSITIVE MTM.

All 7 risk overrides remain materially tighter than base config from progressive Day 1-4 tightening (min_confidence 0.65 vs base 0.50, max_position_pct 0.15 vs 0.20, max_deployed_pct 0.65 vs 0.80, default_sl_pct 0.015 vs 0.02, min_sl_pct 0.01 vs 0.005, max_sl_pct 0.04 vs 0.05, max_sector_pct 0.22 vs 0.35). Disciplined call: no firing trigger, near-zero state delta vs 09:30, no override change. All 5 triggers from 09:00 carry forward to the 10:30 tick — by which point TATAPOWER will have crossed the 24h day-stale line and AU SFB earnings reaction may begin shaping intraday BFSI MTM.
